decisions.description: Microsoft Build event hero with h1, location/date text, description paragraph, CTA link
Eyebrow: Featured Products, H2: The tools you love
4 tabs (M365, Azure, Visual Studio, Windows) each containing 3 card blocks
3 feature cards per tab with heading, description, arrow link
Carousel wrapper for 5 event banner cards
5 event cards with optional date, heading, description, CTA link
Eyebrow: News and updates, H2: Discover what's new
3 feature cards (Copilot SDK, Foundry, Claude) with heading, description, arrow link
Eyebrow: Languages, H2: Choose your language, description paragraph
6 language icon links (.NET, C++, Java, JS, Python, TypeScript)
Eyebrow: Communities, H2: Join our communities
Carousel wrapper for 8 community cards
8 community cards with icon, heading, description, link
Eyebrow: Hubs, H2: Visit the Developer resource hubs
4 hub cards (AI, Build APIs, DevEx, Game Dev) with image, heading, description, arrow link
Quote text, author attribution, 3 product links with icons, video player with thumbnail
H2: Read our blog + More blogs link
Featured blog post (image, category, date, heading, description, link) + 3 recent articles (category, date, heading, link)
Eyebrow: Events, H2: Attend events or watch on demand + More events link
Carousel for 5 event cards
5 event cards with image, date heading, event title link (reuse cards-blog event variant)
H2: Microsoft.Source newsletter, description paragraph, CTA link — no block needed
Eyebrow: Learn, H2: Learn with us
5 tabs (AI, Azure, Copilot, DevOps, Security) each with learning resource cards
Feature cards with heading, description, arrow link inside each tab
Follow us on the web — GitHub, X, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, Bluesky

metadata.title: Microsoft Developer
metadata.description: Any platform. Any language. Our tools. Develop solutions, on your terms, using Microsoft products and services.

summary.notes: Complex page with 13 sections. Only 1 new block needed (video-quote). Tabbed content uses advanced-tabs with card blocks inside. Multiple carousels use advanced-carousel. Languages section reuses quick-links. Blog section reuses cards-blog.
